critical_issues.description: Non-trigger role handlers have triggers field which violates role constraints
critical_issues.resolution: Remove triggers field from orchestrator and operator role handlers

critical_issues.description: Tools field contains non-MCP tool names
critical_issues.resolution: Replace with valid MCP tool names (Read, Write, Edit, Grep, Glob, MultiEdit, etc.)

critical_issues.description: File location does not follow handlers/[role]/[domain]/ pattern
critical_issues.resolution: Move orchestrators to correct domain subdirectories or handlers/orchestrators/ for cross-domain orchestrators

recommendations: Standardize all handlers to use only valid MCP tool names
Remove triggers field from non-trigger role handlers
Establish clear location pattern for orchestrators (domain-specific vs cross-domain)
Consider creating a mapping of conceptual tools to actual MCP tools
Add validation rules to prevent these issues during handler creation
